name: vertkit-crm-builder
description: VertKit CRM/ERP backend foundation and skill for building tenant-safe vertical CRM systems

interface.shortDescription: Build tenant-safe CRM/ERP backends and agent workflows on VertKit.
interface.longDescription: VertKit CRM Builder packages the VertKit backend foundation plus a reusable agent skill for extending CRM/ERP systems safely. It guides core platform work, vertical CRM modules, Postgres/OpenAPI contracts, business rules, and LangGraph workflow boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Add a tenant-safe CRM entity to VertKit.
Design a LangGraph workflow for VertKit.
Build a vertical CRM module on VertKit.
